description_long: This is a vintage military single-propeller airplane with a camouflage paint scheme featuring green, brown, and tan colors, accented by national insignia and a red emblem on the nose. The aircraft has a low-wing configuration with straight wings, each bearing distinctive black-and-white markings. The fuselage is slender and streamlined, with a single open cockpit located just behind the engine and propeller. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both camouflaged and marked with insignia. The landing gear is fixed in a taildragger arrangement, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel.
description: A vintage military camouflage-painted single-propeller airplane with a low-wing, open cockpit, and taildragger landing gear. It features national insignia, a red nose emblem, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the camouflage pattern, open cockpit, red nose emblem, and tail insignia.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight low wings, taildragger gear, and tail markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, propeller, and wing insignia.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the propeller, cockpit placement, and symmetrical wing markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets, featuring prominent insignia on the upper surfaces.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the engine and propeller.
